campaign: Launch Day — Product Hunt + Founders Beta

posts.content:
We just launched on Product Hunt 🚀

CVERiskPilot: Your scanner found 8,000 CVEs. We tell you which 50 actually matter.

→ AI triage that shows its work
→ 10 compliance frameworks built-in
→ Works with Nessus, Qualys, Trivy, Snyk + 7 more

Founders Beta: $29/mo (first 50 spots)

https://cveriskpilot.com/launch

#cybersecurity #producthunt #buildinpublic

Here's what happens when you upload a Nessus scan to CVERiskPilot:

1. Parser identifies 8,247 findings
2. Dedup reduces to 1,203 unique CVEs
3. Enrichment pulls EPSS + KEV data
4. AI triage flags 47 that actually need attention

From 8,247 → 47 in under 60 seconds.

Try the demo (no signup): https://cveriskpilot.com/demo

Building a vulnerability management SaaS as a solo veteran founder in Texas.

100% bootstrapped. No VC. Just a DD-214 and a lot of Claude API calls.

If you're a defense contractor needing CMMC compliance, or a startup needing SOC 2 — this was built for you.

https://cveriskpilot.com

#veteranowned #sdvosb #buildinpublic

Free open-source pipeline scanner:

npx cveriskpilot-scan --path . --framework nist-800-53

Scans your repo for:
• Dependency vulnerabilities (SCA)
• Hardcoded secrets
• IaC misconfigurations
• SBOM generation

Maps findings to compliance controls. Zero config.

#devsecops #cybersecurity

Thank you to everyone who checked us out today. 🙏
